chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 907 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.08.2023. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 4627/2023. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. None present for the petitioner. ----- Petitioner has filed this petition to obtain a certified copy of the revenue record of an agricultural land. This could hardly be a dispute to be entertained under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1973. Even otherwise the petitioner and his counsel has not appeared today in pursuance of this petition. Dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A.
